yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Attackers_exploit_critical_Flowise_flaw_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for remote code execution"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59528" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Attackers_exploit_critical_Flowise_flaw_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for remote code execution"

    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59528" ascii wide nocase

        any of them
}

        description = "Detection for Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day"

        date = "2026-04-09"

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 2208 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 102 as HIGH risk. 24 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include multiple unattributed groups. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
